name: PLAYspace Virtual Music Library
short_description: PLAYspace - virtual spatial music library with amazing FX player. Create a collection of your favorite music in 3D environment.
detailed_description:
UPDATE v1.01

-New feature: Play album (without adding to library) -Optimization (video memory leaks) -Fixed some bugs -Video tutorial For video tutorial click on book icon in a menu


Support

Hello everyone. Thanks for using PLAYspace. If you have any questions or suggestions for improving program, please report it in the discussions section.


About the Software

PLAYspace - virtual spatial music library with amazing FX player. Create a collection of your favorite music in 3D environment. - Arrange albums like wall posters - Sort by location - PLAY music in fullscreen mode with visual effects or switch program to desktop mini player - Expand your library with new environments (DLC) Add your music files to PLAYspace and immerse yourself in the vast ocean of sound.
about_the_game:
PLAYspace - virtual spatial music library with amazing FX player.
Create a collection of your favorite music in 3D environment.

- Arrange albums like wall posters
- Sort by location
- PLAY music in fullscreen mode with visual effects
or switch program to desktop mini player
- Expand your library with new environments (DLC)

Add your music files to PLAYspace
and immerse yourself in the vast ocean of sound.
